error_signature: links not clickable in plain text email
title: Links not clickable in plain text emails
symptom: Links in the email sent using the Text section are not clickable in non-Gmail mobile accounts.
applies_when: Email body is sent as plain text
not_this_if: Links are clickable in other email clients
root_cause: Some email clients do not render links as clickable in plain text emails, which can lead to user confusion and reduced engagement. This behavior varies by email provider and client.
fix_steps: Switch to using the HTML section of the Send Email node
Ensure the email body is formatted as HTML with proper link tags
Test the email in various clients to confirm links are clickable
agent_instruction: Use the HTML section of the Send Email node to ensure links are clickable.
